product.title: Lancôme Renergie Lift Makeup Foundation - Lightweight & Hydrating Formula, Medium-Full Coverage, SPF 27, Anti-Aging, Lifting & Firming, Up to 12H Wear

primaryFeatures.color: 310 Clair 30: tan skin tones with cool pink undertones

featureBullets: RADIANT MEDIUM COVERAGE: Lightweight foundation glides on smoothly, evens skin tone and texture, and provides a luminous finish.
ANTI-AGING BENEFITS: Hydrates, firms, and visibly lifts skin for up to 12 hours with skin-loving ingredients like Caffeine, Vitamin E, and Iris extract.
SPF 27 PROTECTION: Broad-spectrum UVA/UVB defense to protect skin against premature aging caused by sun exposure.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: Dermatologist-tested formula for dry, oily, combination, and sensitive skin, ideal for mature skin.
LONGWEAR & TRANSFER-RESISTANT: Up to 12-hour wear that doesn’t cake, crease, or transfer, color stays true throughout the day.

specification.value: 310 Clair 30: tan skin tones with cool pink undertones
Radiant finish, SPF 27, up to 12 hours of wear, minimizes wrinkles, and non-comedogenic.
#6,641 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #76 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be excellent, with good coverage that can be layered as needed, and they appreciate how it moisturizes skin all day while keeping it looking radiant. The product blends flawlessly into the skin and creates a natural, dewy appearance, while being lightweight and lasting all day. While some customers consider it worth the price, others feel it's not worth the cost.

reviews.reviewText: I have been using Lancome's Tient Idole for many years. But my skin is more "mature" and I find that foundation too heavy now. I found this formula looking for good options for mature skin and I love it. It does a good job of providing enough coverage without looking or feeling heavy. It doesn't settle into my wrinkles or accentuate my crow's feet like some other foundations do. It has good lasting power considering my skin still tends to be oily. It does transfer when rubbed with fabric (shirt or jacket collar) but with my skin type I have never found a foundation that doesn't. By the end of the day I have a bit of shine (again, I am quite oily) but some blotting papers does the trick of fixing that. The color is a good match for my skin tone and doesn't look like I'm wearing a mask. It is quite natural while also looking "put together". Glad I found something that works for me. Highly recommend.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: ’ve been using Lancôme’s face makeup for a few weeks now, and I’m honestly impressed. The coverage is flawless without feeling heavy, and it blends like a dream—perfect for those busy mornings when you want to look put-together in minutes. My skin feels soft and hydrated all day, and it doesn’t cake or settle into fine lines. What I love most is how natural it looks in photos and in real life—definitely a step up from drugstore brands. It’s a little of an investment, but totally worth it if you want that smooth, radiant finish that lasts. Tip: Pair it with a good primer and setting spray, and it will stay fresh all day—even through a busy day chasing kids or running errands!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 18, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Great makeup for my aging skin.
reviews.reviewText: Great product. It doesn’t settle in my wrinkles. Covers well. I have dry skin. It blends well. Matched my skin good! It’s smooth, not thick and sticky.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 9, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Best foundation I have ever used. It’s lightweight and blends in so well. Love that it has added sunscreen protection too. It’s pricey, but you need just a little and my old bottle lasted almost 9 months.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love the product. It is not a total coverage foundation but it definitely blends for a natural look. However, I absolutely hate the dispensing system. I have used over a half dozen of these bottles and the pump system quits working when they are only partially empty. I can continue to use the product for weeks afterward, but it becomes really messy as it involves opening it up and using the pump tube as a dip stick or removing it totally and shaking the makeup out of the bottle! Perhaps a tube would work better.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Naturally looking coverage with smooth, breathable effect.
reviews.reviewText: This is the best foundation I have ever used. All other brands I have used have been not even close to this one: they either have not enough cover or gave opposite effect- being too thick and dry for my skin. Lancome Renergie provides smooth light breathe able effect, simultaneously cover all imperfections on my skin. I like it! Another coins: I glad to see expiration date on the bottle and on the box. My skin is not very light, but it not dark either, so the best color for me for all seasons is 240 Claire C. Next time I probably would try 255 N for summertime. It my third bottle so far and I will buy it again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 7, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I have used for years and it is so good I can’t imagine ever changing brands. The amount of coverage is great! so use a very small amount. I like that I am applying sun protection at the same time I am covering decades of damage . Color match is perfect.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Used this for years. Good coverage. Many colors to choose. Sunscreen. Easy to apply.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 27, 2025
